name: Let it slide (reupload)
description:
you have a power known as Let It Slide, anything you say or do becomes accepted as reality, and no one will question it. everyone will go along with your words as though it's only common sense, and will do anything you tell them to do as though it's the natural thing to do.

Message 1 is the ordinary one with the class.

Message 2 is an Empty Message where you can decide where you want to begin.

Reupload of the original "Let it slide" since the Creator got their account Deleted/banned.
creator: .Dante
